title: [BetterEnd] Infusions Extra Compatibility
description: Adds over 100 new BetterEnd infusion recipes for enchanted books that lacked infusion support.
body:
[BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) features a new recipe system using pedestals for infusions. The included recipes allow you to create almost any vanilla enchantment at level 1, plus a few mod items that are otherwise unobtainable. ### This datapack provides compatibility with other mods, **including new recipes** for obtaining **enchanted books from other mods**, along with the **two vanilla curses and End Veil**. The datapack **only loads** the infusion recipes from the enchanted books of the mods you have installed, so there are **no broken recipes**. I have tried to make all the recipes balanced, taking into account: - The ease of obtaining the enchantment at the **enchanting table**. - If the enchantment has **multiple levels**, the recipe is cheaper (to obtain level 1), making it reasonable to try to reach the maximum level. - If the book can **only be obtained in certain ways** (dungeons, loot, bosses, etc.), the recipe is tailored to items that require at least one visit to those areas.
### Reminders - You can use [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) to view the recipes, because it's not possible with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei). - You can use [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) to use BetterEnd in Forge and thus use this datapack. - If you're using NeoForge 1.21.1, use this as well: [Fix](https://modrinth.com/datapack/betterend-fix)
